parameters.content:
### Add Jotform submissions to a Monday.com board (Jotform Trigger Ôćĺ Monday.com Create Item)

Capture new Jotform submissions and instantly create items on a Monday.com board with mapped columns (email, dates, dropdowns, instructions, etc.). Great for routing **leads**, **requests**, or **intake forms** straight into your teamÔÇÖs Monday pipeline.

## ­čŤá´ŞĆ Setup ÔÇö Monday.com
1. In Monday.com, **generate an API token** (Admin/Developers Ôćĺ API).  
2. In **n8n Ôćĺ Credentials Ôćĺ New Ôćĺ Monday.com**, paste your **API token**.  
3. Identify and set:
   - **Board ID** (from your board URL or via node ÔÇťListÔÇŁ operations)  
   - **Group ID** (e.g., `topics`)  
   - **Column IDs** that match your board (examples used by this workflow):  
     - `text_mkvdj8v3` Ôćĺ Email (Text)  
     - `date_mkvdg4aa` Ôćĺ Start Date (Date)  
     - `dropdown_mkvdjwra` Ôćĺ Engagement Type (Dropdown)  
     - `dropdown_mkvdd9v3` Ôćĺ Campaign Type (Dropdown)  
     - `text_mkvd2md9` Ôćĺ Campaign Type (as Text label)  
     - `text_mkvd1bj2` Ôćĺ Instructions (Text)  
     - `text_mkvd5w3y` Ôćĺ Domain (Text)  
4. Update the **label Ôćĺ ID mappings** inside the Monday.com node if your dropdown IDs differ (e.g., `Engagement A` Ôćĺ `1`, `Engagement B` Ôćĺ `2`).

---
## ­čôČ Contact  
Need help customizing this (e.g., more fields, file uploads, or multi-board routing)?  

- ­čôž **rbreen@ynteractive.com**  
- ­čöŚ **Robert Breen** ÔÇö https://www.linkedin.com/in/robert-breen-29429625/  
- ­čîÉ **ynteractive.com** ÔÇö https://ynteractive.com

## ­čŤá´ŞĆ Setup ÔÇö Jotform (simple)
1. **Add your Jotform API key** (Jotform Account Ôćĺ Settings Ôćĺ API Ôćĺ Create Key).  
2. **Create your form template** in Jotform (use fields like Name, Email, Start Date, Engagement Type, Campaign Type, Instructions).  
3. In **n8n**, open the **Jotform Trigger** node and **choose your Jotform template/form** from the dropdown. ThatÔÇÖs it.

## ­čŤá´ŞĆ Setup ÔÇö Monday.com
1. Go to **https://monday.com** Ôćĺ profile menu Ôćĺ **Admin / Developers** Ôćĺ **API** and **generate a personal API token** (or use an existing token with the correct permissions).  
2. In n8n, create a new **Monday.com** credential and paste your **API token**.  
3. Identify your **Board ID** and **Group ID**:
   - Open your board in a browser; the URL often contains the board ID.  
   - Group IDs can be read via the Monday.com node (e.g., ÔÇťListÔÇŁ operations) or from the UI if available.  
4. Confirm column IDs on your board. Common examples used by this template (you can map to your own):  
   - `text_mkvdj8v3` Ôćĺ Email (Text)  
   - `date_mkvdg4aa` Ôćĺ Start Date (Date)  
   - `dropdown_mkvdjwra` Ôćĺ Engagement Type (Dropdown)  
   - `dropdown_mkvdd9v3` Ôćĺ Campaign Type (Dropdown)  
   - `text_mkvd2md9` Ôćĺ Campaign Type (Label as Text)  
   - `text_mkvd1bj2` Ôćĺ Instructions (Text)  
   - `text_mkvd5w3y` Ôćĺ Domain (Text)  
5. Update the **labelÔćĺID mappings** in the Monday.com node if your dropdown IDs differ:  
   - Example mapping in the JSON:  
     - `Engagement A` Ôćĺ `1`, `Engagement B` Ôćĺ `2`  
     - `Campaign A` Ôćĺ `1`, `Campaign B` Ôćĺ `2`  
   Replace these with the actual IDs from your boardÔÇÖs dropdown columns.
